- Advanced Security Suite: Equipped with an Anti-Prank Alarm (triggers after 5 failed attempts), Spy Code (hide your PIN among random digits), and a Privacy Function to block external electronic access.
- Auto-Locking Mechanism: Motorized bolts engage automatically as soon as the door is closed, ensuring your home is never left accidentally unsecured.
- Emergency Power: Powered by 4 AA Alkaline batteries with a built-in Type-C USB port for emergency power backup if batteries are drained.

Specifications:
- Door Compatibility: Ideal for wooden doors with 35mm–65mm thickness; standard 60mm backset.
- Access Capacity: Stores up to 99 Fingerprints, 99 User Passcodes, and 99 RFID Cards.
- Construction: High-strength Aluminum Alloy with 3 Stainless Steel (SS 304) locking bolts.
- Finish: Luxury Matte Black.
- Warranty: 3-year brand warranty with free professional installation by Godrej experts.
